mod-progressbar-size-default.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-size-default`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-font-size.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-font-size`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-sized-font-size)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-thickness.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-thickness`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-sized-thickness)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-spacing-top-to-text.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-spacing-top-to-text`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-sized-spacing-top-to-text)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-animation-ease-in-out-in.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-animation-ease-in-out-indeterminate`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-ease-in-out)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-animation-duration-indet.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-animation-duration-indeterminate`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-2000)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-line-height-cjk.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-line-height-cjk`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-cjk-line-height-100)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-min-size.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-min-size`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progress-bar-minimum-width)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-max-size.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-max-size`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progress-bar-maximum-width)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-line-height.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar:lang(ja), .spectrum-ProgressBar:lang(ko), .spectrum-ProgressBar:lang(zh)`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-line-height`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-line-height-100)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-spacing-label-to-progres.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-spacing-label-to-progressbar`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-spacing-75)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-spacing-label-to-text.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-spacing-label-to-text`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-spacing-200)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-fill-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar.spectrum-ProgressBar--staticWhite`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-fill-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-accent-color-900)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-track-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar.spectrum-ProgressBar--staticWhite`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-track-color-default`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-track-color)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-text-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar.spectrum-ProgressBar--staticWhite`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-text-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-neutral-content-color-default)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-label-and-value-white.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-label-and-value-white`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-white)`, if not set.

mod-progressbar-fill-color-white.description:
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-fill-color-white`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-white)`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar, .spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeM`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeS`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeL`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeXL`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-size-default`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progressbar-size-2800)`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-size-2400.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default`.
Defaults to `192px`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-sized-font-size.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar, .spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeM`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeS`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeL`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeXL`.

Defaults to `var(--spectrum-font-size-200)`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-sized-thickness.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar, .spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeM`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeS`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeL`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeXL`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-thickness`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-progress-bar-thickness-extra-large)`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-sized-spacing-top-t.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar, .spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeM`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeS`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeL`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sizeXL`.

spectrum-progressbar-size-2500.description:

Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default`.
Defaults to `200px`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-size-2800.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar`.
Used by `--spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default`.
Defaults to `224px`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-size-default.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-ProgressBar`.
Used by `.spectrum-ProgressBar`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar--sideLabel .spectrum-ProgressBar-track`, `to`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-progressbar-size-default, var(--spectrum-progressbar-sized-size-default))`, if not set.

spectrum-progressbar-font-size.description:

Used by `--mod-fieldlabel-font-size`.

spectrum-progressbar-thickness.description:

Used by `.spectrum-ProgressBar-track`, `.spectrum-ProgressBar-fill`.

spectrum-progressbar-max-size.description:
